% check a.php
a.php:9:18: class DupClass already has method foo
a.php:14:13: class DupClass already has property name
a.php:17:8: class DupClass already has constant X

-- a.php --
<?php

class DupClass
{
	public function foo(): void
	{
	}

	public function foo(): int
	{
	}

	public string $name;
	public int $name;

	const X = 1;
	const X = 2;
}
